Name: Wet Effects
Description: Covers parameters relating to wet effects.

Fields.Name: Override Albedo
Fields.Description: Overrides the base surface color when wetness is applied, simulating darker or saturated materials.

Fields.Name: Override Shininess
Fields.Description: Overrides surface shininess to simulate increased specular response on wet surfaces.

Fields.Name: Albedo Rate
Fields.Description: Controls the intensity at which wetness affects the surface albedo over time or exposure.

Fields.Name: Shininess Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly wetness increases surface shininess to simulate moisture accumulation.
